sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْ مَرْيَمُ الثَّلَّاجَةَ وَلَمْ تَجِدْ شَيْئًا.
sentences.translation: Merjem je otvorila frižider i nije ništa našla.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam opened the fridge and found nothing.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَذْهَبَ إِلَى الْمَتْجَرِ الْقَرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da ode u obližnju prodavnicu.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to go to the nearby store.

sentences.translation: Kupila je povrće, sir i hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: She bought vegetables, cheese, and bread.

sentences.arabic: رَجَعَتْ وَطَبَخَتْ وَجْبَةً بَسِيطَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا جَيِّدَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Vratila se i skuhala jednostavan ali dobar obrok.
sentences.translationEn: She returned and cooked a simple but good meal.
